title: Senior Doctor - Dr Lal PathLabs - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr Lal PathLabs - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
